messages.analyzedData: I've analyzed your transaction data and I'm ready to help you optimize your loyalty program. Here's what I can help you with:
messages.performanceAnalysis: Performance Analysis - How your loyalty program is performing

messages.simplicity: Discover the simplicity of getting started and enjoy exclusive benefits tailored just for you.

messages.chooseScheme: Choose from one of our ready made schemes above or build your own custom loyalty scheme

settings.title: Settings

emptyStates.noMembers: No members yet. Members will appear here when they enroll in your loyalty program.
emptyStates.noRewards: No rewards created yet. Create your first reward to get started.
emptyStates.noCampaigns: No campaigns sent yet. Create a campaign to engage your customers.
emptyStates.noTransactions: No transactions found. Transactions will appear here as customers earn and redeem points.
emptyStates.noIntegrations: No integrations connected. Connect an integration to extend your loyalty program.
emptyStates.noAnalytics: Not enough data to display analytics. Start your loyalty program to see insights.
emptyStates.noActivity: No recent activity. Activity will appear here as customers interact with your program.
emptyStates.noSettings: Settings not configured. Complete your setup to customize your program.
emptyStates.noResults: No results found. Try adjusting your search or filters.
emptyStates.noNotifications: No notifications. You'll see updates about your loyalty program here.
emptyStates.noReports: No reports available. Reports will be generated once you have activity data.
emptyStates.noUsers: No users added yet. Invite team members to manage your loyalty program.
emptyStates.noBackups: No backups available. Backups are created automatically to protect your data.

confirmations.deleteMember: Are you sure you want to delete this member? This action cannot be undone.
confirmations.deleteReward: Are you sure you want to delete this reward? This action cannot be undone.
confirmations.deleteCampaign: Are you sure you want to delete this campaign? This action cannot be undone.
confirmations.deleteIntegration: Are you sure you want to disconnect this integration? Your data will not be deleted.
confirmations.deleteUser: Are you sure you want to remove this user? They will lose access to the dashboard.
confirmations.deleteAccount: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone and all data will be lost.
confirmations.disconnectIntegration: Disconnecting this integration will stop syncing data. Are you sure?
confirmations.revokeApiKey: Revoking this API key will immediately disable access for any applications using it. Are you sure?
confirmations.clearCache: Clearing the cache may temporarily slow down the dashboard. Continue?
confirmations.resetSettings: Resetting settings will restore all values to defaults. Are you sure?
confirmations.sendTestNotification: Send a test notification to verify your notification settings are working correctly?
confirmations.runSync: Running a manual sync will update all data from the integration. This may take a few minutes. Continue?
confirmations.deleteBackup: Are you sure you want to delete this backup? This action cannot be undone.

help.points: Points are earned when customers make purchases or complete activities. They can be redeemed for rewards.
help.tiers: Tiers are membership levels that customers unlock by earning points. Higher tiers offer better rewards and benefits.
help.rewards: Rewards are prizes customers can redeem using their points. Create attractive rewards to encourage engagement.
help.campaigns: Campaigns are targeted messages sent to customers to promote your loyalty program and drive engagement.
help.integrations: Integrations connect your loyalty program with external platforms like Shopify, Square, or Clover for seamless data sync.
help.webhooks: Webhooks send real-time notifications to your server when loyalty events occur, enabling custom automation.
help.apiKeys: API keys allow external applications to access your loyalty program data securely. Keep them secret and rotate regularly.
help.twoFactor: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security by requiring a code from your phone when logging in.
